mapper.sql: uf.id, uf.created_time, uf.created_timestamp, uf.created_by, uf.created_id, uf.modified_time, uf.modified_timestamp, uf.modified_by, uf.modified_id, uf.deleted, uf.version, uf.remark, uf.status, uf.user_id, uf.user_avatar, uf.user_nick_name, uf.friend_id, uf.friend_avatar, uf.friend_nick_name, uf.org_id
